prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CEGRKCFFAKOG-11PC-SML-CLR Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Compact Eye Glass Repair Kit with Screwdriver, 11pc Fix Broken Glasses Vision Care Description: Have you ever needed to repair your eyeglasses and had to wait to take them to the repair shop? Wait no more with the emergency eyeglass repair kit. This kit comes with everything you’ll need to make common repairs - a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets.

All of the repair tools and accessories fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage case measuring just 4” in length. You can easily store it in your pocket, purse, backpack, or car for quick and convenient repairs.

Each kit comes with a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets so you can make common eyeglass repairs with ease. In addition to repairing eyeglasses, you can also use these precision tools and accessories to fix your favorite sunglasses, small electronics, and other appliances that require precise repairs in hard-to-reach places. Search Terms: eyeglasses eyeglass nose pads repair kit screws screwdriver set silicone precision screw frame frames glasses Features: - EMERGENCY EYE GLASS REPAIR KIT – The eyeglass repair kit will come in handy if you need to repair your glasses on the go and can’t wait to take them to the repair shop and will save you from having to buy a new pair of glasses. - COMPACT CONTAINER TUBE – All of the repair tools and accessories fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage case measuring just 4” in length. You can easily store it in your pocket, purse, backpack, or car for quick and convenient repairs. - ACCESSORIES AND REPAIR TOOLS – Each kit comes with a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets so you can make common eyeglass repairs with ease. - VERSATILE EYEGLASSES REPAIR KIT – In addition to repairing eyeglasses, you can also use these precision tools and accessories to fix your favorite sunglasses, small electronics, and other appliances that require precise repairs in hard-to-reach places. - SPECIFICATIONS – 10 piece kit (screwdriver, replacement screws, nose pads, and grommets), Materials: plastic/steel; Plastic storage case with red lid; Compact design === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal 11-pc Eyeglass Repair Kit with Screwdriver
